ABOUT

PHOTOGRAPHER & CREATIVE

Hey! I am Samvar. I just genuinely love taking photos of anything and everything. Doesn't matter if it's a stunning cathedral, a random street, or someone's face catching the light just right. If I see something worth capturing, I'm shooting it.

Photography started as a hobby that kind of turned into an obsession. I love portraits most of all. There's something about freezing a real moment with a real person that never gets old.

If you want portraits, event photos, travel shots, or just want to work on something creative together, hire me. I'm open to it.
